text.title: AI IaC Review Gate Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the gate-report shape, the waiver record, and the merge-block rule.

section.title: Required gate-report fields

list.item: pr_number (integer)
commit_sha (string)
iac_files_touched (array of repo-relative paths)
ai_authorship_signals (array; same set as in `ai-base-image-cve-triage`)
checks (object with four keys: drift, security, performance, multi_arch)
checks. shape: {status: pass | block | advise, findings: [], waivers: []}
verdict (enum: pass, block)
codeowners_approver (string or null; required when verdict==pass AND any waiver present)

section.reference: Authoritative JSON Schema for the gate report.

list.item: check_id: stable id of the finding being waived
rationale: free text, >= 80 chars
expiry_utc: ISO date, <= 90 days from now
approver: CODEOWNERS username, never an AI agent
approved_at_utc: ISO timestamp
verdict=pass when every check is status `pass` OR every block-finding has a non-expired waiver with all required fields.
verdict=block when ANY: a check is status `block` without waiver; a waiver is expired; a waiver lacks rationale / expiry / approver; codeowners_approver is empty when waivers present.

antipattern.description: Gate-report status `pass` while waivers list is non-empty and codeowners_approver is null.
antipattern.reason: r5 violation. Waivers require human approval.

antipattern.description: Plan output contains `apply` or `destroy` commands instead of plan diff.
antipattern.reason: r2 violation. Gate must be plan-only.

antipattern.description: multi_arch check status `pass` with only amd64 in the build matrix while arch-matrix.yaml lists arm64.
antipattern.reason: r4 violation. Arch-matrix declares the floor.

antipattern.description: Waiver expiry date > 90 days from now.
antipattern.reason: r3 violation. Expiry must be bounded.

list.item: All four checks have a status field, even if `advise` only.
Every waiver has the five required fields.
Expiry dates are in the future.
multi_arch check ran on every architecture from arch-matrix.yaml.
verdict matches the merge-block rule.
